BBox.description: Axis-aligned bounding box in PDF user space (origin bottom-left).

description:
A node in the document structure tree. The root is a synthetic document
node (`id` 0, `level` 0, empty `title`) whose `children` are the top-level
sections; every other node is a heading and the content beneath it.

bbox.description: Heading bounding box (PDF user space) — citation anchor. Zero for root.

id.description:
Stable id = heading appearance order in reading order (root = 0). Chunks
reference this via [`crate::chunk::Chunk::section_id`].

level.description: Nesting level (1 = top-level section; 0 only for the root).

page.description: Page the heading sits on (1-based; 0 for the root).

title.description: Heading text (empty for the synthetic root).

title: Section
